00045| const [error, setError] = useState(null); 00046| 00047| /** 00048| * Fetch all NFTs owned by a specific address 00049| * 00050| * @param params - Object containing all parameters: 00051| * - ownerAddress: string - The wallet address to get NFTs for (e.g., '0x123...abc') 00052| * - options?: GetNftsForOwnerOptions - Optional filtering and pagination options: 00053| * * pageKey?: string - Token for pagination from previous response 00054| * * pageSize?: number - Number of NFTs to return (default 100, max 100) 00055| * * withMetadata?: boolean - Skip fetching metadata for faster response (default false) 00056| * @returns Promise - See type definition above for structure 00057| */ 00058| const fetchNftsByOwnerOnMultipleChains = useCallback(async (params: { 00059| ownerAddress: string; 00060| chainIds: number[]; 00061| options?: GetNftsForOwnerOptions; 00062| }): Promise => { 00063| setIsLoading(true); 00064| setError(null); 00065| 00066| try { 00067| // Convert chainIds to networks and create portfolio addresses 00068| const networks = params.chainIds.map(chainId => getAlchemyNetwork(chainId) as unknown as AlchemyNetwork); 00069| const portfolioAddresses = [{ 00070| address: params.ownerAddress, 00071| networks: networks, 00072| }]; 00073| 00074| const response = await alchemy.portfolio.getNftsByWallet(portfolioAddresses, !!params.options?.withMetadata, params.options?.pageKey, params.options?.pageSize); 00075| if (params.options?.withMetadata && response?.data?.ownedNfts?.length && response?.data?.ownedNfts[0].raw?.metadata) { 00076| response.data.ownedNfts = response.data.ownedNfts.map((nft: any) => ({ 00077| ...nft, 00078| metadata: nft, 00079| })); 00080| } 00081| 00082| const formattedResponse = (response as any as GetNftsByWalletResponse); 00083| formattedResponse.data.ownedNfts = formattedResponse.data.ownedNfts.map((nft) => ({ 00084| ...nft, 00085| balance: nft.balance.startsWith("0x") ? BigInt(nft.balance).toString() : nft.balance, 00086| })); 00087| setData(formattedResponse); 00088| return formattedResponse; 00089| } catch (err) { 00090| const error = err instanceof Error ? err : new Error('Failed to fetch NFTs for owner'); 00091| setError(error); 00092| throw error; 00093| } finally { 00094| setIsLoading(false); 00095| } 00096| }, []); 00097| 00098| return { 00099| data, 00100| isLoading, 00101| error, 00102| fetchNftsByOwnerOnMultipleChains, 00103| }; 00104| }
